page_metadata.biotools__summary: SPLICEATOR is an eukaryotic splice sites prediction program. It is based on convolutional neural network architecture. A model has been built for each type of splice site (Donor and Acceptor).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SPLICEATOR is an eukaryotic splice sites prediction program. It is based on convolutional neural network architecture. A model has been built for each type of splice site (Donor and Acceptor).
